arm_grant_air_fighters = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_fighters_y2030 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_fighters_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_fighter - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_fighter }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { early_fighter = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # cv_early_fighter - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = cv_early_fighter }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { cv_early_fighter = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                NOT = { has_tech = supersonic_small_airframe }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { supersonic_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = fighter8 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { fighter8 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (11 techs) --

# heavy_fighter1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# heavy_fighter3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# iw_medium_airframe
#   year=1960 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_airframe
#   year=1980 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_airframe
#   year=2000 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_airframe
#   year=2006 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe
#   year=2012 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# more_modern_medium_airframe
#   year=2018 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# near_future_medium_airframe
#   year=2024 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# future_medium_airframe
#   year=2030 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y2030 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # heavy_fighter1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / NAVAL_BOMBERS (11 techs) --

# naval_bomber1
#   year=1960 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# iw_naval_airframe
#   year=1960 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber2
#   year=1980 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_naval_airframe
#   year=1980 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber3
#   year=2000 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_naval_airframe
#   year=2000 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber4
#   year=2006 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_naval_airframe
#   year=2006 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber5
#   year=2012 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# modern_naval_airframe
#   year=2012 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# naval_bomber6
#   year=2024 branch=air category=naval_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y2024 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_naval_bombers_y1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # naval_bomber1 - 1960
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { naval_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # iw_naval_airframe - 1960
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = iw_naval_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { iw_naval_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / STRATEGIC_BOMBERS (14 techs) --

# reinforced_wings_mothership
#   year=1942 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# miniature_fighters
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# aerial_hangars
#   year=1946 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# jet_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber1
#   year=1960 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# iw_large_airframe
#   year=1960 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber2
#   year=1980 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_large_airframe
#   year=1980 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber3
#   year=2006 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_large_airframe
#   year=2006 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber4
#   year=2018 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_large_airframe
#   year=2018 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber5
#   year=2024 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe
#   year=2024 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1946 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1946 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y2024 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers_y1942 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        # reinforced_wings_mothership - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = reinforced_wings_mothership }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { reinforced_wings_mothership = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # strategic_bomber3 - 2006
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = strategic_bomber3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { strategic_bomber3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_large_airframe - 2006
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_large_airframe }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

# -- AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (10 techs) --

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=2000 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# iw_uav_airframe
#   year=2000 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=2006 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_uav_airframe
#   year=2006 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=2018 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber4
#   year=2024 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber5
#   year=2030 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y2030 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_bomber - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_bomber }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { early_bomber = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers_y1945 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
            }
            set_technology = { jet_tactical_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- AIR / TRANSPORT (6 techs) --

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_air_transport_y1948 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_air_transport_y1933 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_transport_plane - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            }
            set_technology = { early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # bba_early_transport_plane - 1933
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
                has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
            }
            set_technology = { bba_early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / ELECTRONICS (21 techs) --

# basic_fire_control_system
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_fire_control_system
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_fire_control_system
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# near_future_fire_control_system
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_fire_control_system
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_radio
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_encryption
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_decryption
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_encryption
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_decryption
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_radio
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_encryption
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_decryption
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# electronic_mechanical_engineering
#   year=1990 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# radio
#   year=2000 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanical_computing
#   year=2000 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# computing_machine
#   year=2002 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_computing_machine
#   year=2008 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_computing_machine
#   year=2016 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# near_future_computing_machine
#   year=2024 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# future_computing_machine
#   year=2032 branch=industry_electronics category=electronics
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1990 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2002 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2002 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2008 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2016 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { basic_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { improved_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # near_future_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = near_future_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { near_future_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # future_fire_control_system - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = future_fire_control_system }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { future_fire_control_system = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y1990 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # electronic_mechanical_engineering - 1990
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { electronic_mechanical_engineering = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # radio - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = radio }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { radio = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # mechanical_computing - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanical_computing }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
            }
            set_technology = { mechanical_computing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2004 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2004 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2008 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2016 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2028 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2028 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_fortification_tech - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_fortification_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { basic_fortification_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # coastal_fort_tech_1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = coastal_fort_tech_1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { coastal_fort_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # excavation1 - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = excavation1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { excavation1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_y2012 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # assembly_line_production - 2012
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = assembly_line_production }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { assembly_line_production = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        # excavation4 - 2024
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = excavation4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
            }
            set_technology = { excavation4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (7 techs) --

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# hide_naval_facilities
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# atomic_research
#   year=2004 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=2008 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=2012 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1950 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2004 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2004 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2008 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y2012 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_y1943 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        # isotope_separation_centrifugal - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { isotope_separation_centrifugal = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # nuclear_reactor_heavy_water - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { nuclear_reactor_heavy_water = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # hide_naval_facilities - 1943

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = hide_naval_facilities }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
                arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            }
            set_technology = { hide_naval_facilities = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# cavity_magnatron

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
