arm_grant_land_infantry_y1980 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_weapons1 - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # support_weapons - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # body_armor - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = body_armor }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { body_armor = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # camouflage - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = camouflage }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { camouflage = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # drones - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = drones }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { drones = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_rifle_upgrade - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_rifle_upgrade }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_rifle_upgrade = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # support_weapons2 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # body_armor2 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = body_armor2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { body_armor2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # paratroopers - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = paratroopers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { paratroopers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # marines - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = marines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { marines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_mountaineers - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_mountaineers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_rangers - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_rangers }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_rangers = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y2002 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2002 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_weapons2 - 2002
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2002 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # infantry_rifle_upgrade2 - 2002
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_rifle_upgrade2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2002 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_rifle_upgrade2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # camouflage2 - 2002
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = camouflage2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2002 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { camouflage2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # drones2 - 2002
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = drones2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2002 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { drones2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_special_forces - 2002
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_special_forces }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2002 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_special_forces = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_y2004 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2004 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # upgraded_infantry_weapons1 - 2004
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = upgraded_infantry_weapons1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2004 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { upgraded_infantry_weapons1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # infantry_rifle_upgrade3 - 2004
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_rifle_upgrade3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2004 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_rifle_upgrade3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # support_weapons3 - 2004
        if = {

                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2004 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # body_armor3 - 2004

                NOT = { has_tech = body_armor3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2004 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { body_armor3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2004 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            set_technology = { paratroopers2 = 1 popup = no }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2004 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2004 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2025 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        # tech_mountaineers4 - 2025

                NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2025 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        # infantry_weapons5 - 2030
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { infantry_weapons5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # support_weapons8 - 2030
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons8 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { support_weapons8 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # camouflage6 - 2030
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = camouflage6 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { camouflage6 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (23 techs) --

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry1
#   year=1960 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis_80s
#   year=1960 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank1
#   year=1980 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1980 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis
#   year=1980 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank2
#   year=2000 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis_00s
#   year=2000 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank3
#   year=2006 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=2006 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis_10s
#   year=2010 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank4
#   year=2012 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry4
#   year=2018 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# IFV_chassis_20s
#   year=2020 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tank5
#   year=2024 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# mechanised_infantry5
#   year=2024 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2010 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2010 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2024 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y1918 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # gwtank - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { gwtank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # gwtank_chassis - 1918
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { gwtank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_tank3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # mechanised_infantry3 - 2006

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { mechanised_infantry3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_y2010 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2010 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        # IFV_chassis_10s - 2010

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2010 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        limit = {

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # light_tank5 - 2024

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_tank5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { light_tank5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # mechanised_infantry5 - 2024
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { mechanised_infantry5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / MECHANISED (12 techs) --

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry1
#   year=1960 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry2
#   year=1980 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry1
#   year=2000 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry3
#   year=2006 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# light_mechanized_infantry4
#   year=2012 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry2
#   year=2012 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[mechanised_infantry3]

# light_mechanized_infantry5
#   year=2018 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry3
#   year=2024 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[mechanised_infantry4]

# light_mechanized_infantry6
#   year=2030 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_mechanised_y2030 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_mechanised_y1940 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # mechanised_infantry - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            }
            set_technology = { mechanised_infantry = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_mechanised_y2024 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # amphibious_mechanized_infantry3 - 2024
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry3 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
                has_tech = mechanised_infantry4
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_mechanised_y2030 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # light_mechanized_infantry6 - 2030
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = light_mechanized_infantry6 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
            }
            set_technology = { light_mechanized_infantry6 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / MEDIUM_TANKS (20 techs) --

# basic_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1938 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank1
#   year=1960 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank2
#   year=1980 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_80s
#   year=1980 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank3
#   year=2000 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_00s
#   year=2000 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank4
#   year=2006 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_10s
#   year=2010 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank5
#   year=2012 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank6
#   year=2018 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_20s
#   year=2020 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank7
#   year=2024 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank8
#   year=2030 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tank_chassis_30s
#   year=2030 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# IFV_chassis_30s
#   year=2030 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2010 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y2010 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y2030 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        # basic_medium_tank_chassis - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_medium_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { main_battle_tank_chassis_10s = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { main_battle_tank_chassis_30s = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { IFV_chassis_30s = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) --

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1960 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_y1960 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_y1945 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # main_battle_tank - 1945
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            }
            set_technology = { main_battle_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_y1960 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        # main_battle_tank_chassis - 1960
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { main_battle_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- LAND / MOTORISED (11 techs) --

# tech_trucks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry
#   year=1960 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry1
#   year=1980 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# nonsnb_technicality_tech
#   year=1980 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# technicality_tech
#   year=1980 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry2
#   year=2000 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# nonnsb_technicality_tech2
#   year=2000 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# technicality_tech2
#   year=2000 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry3
#   year=2012 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry4
#   year=2018 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry5
#   year=2030 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y1960 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_motorised_y2030 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_motorised_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }

        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_trucks }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            }
            set_technology = { tech_trucks = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # motorised_infantry4 - 2018
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry4 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            }
            set_technology = { motorised_infantry4 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_motorised_y2030 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # motorised_infantry5 - 2030
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry5 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
            }
            set_technology = { motorised_infantry5 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2006 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y2006 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2018 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y2018 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_support_y2030 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # armored_train - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armored_train }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { armored_train = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_recon_focus_bonus - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon_focus_bonus }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

    }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                NOT = { has_tech = tech_military_police }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_military_police = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_maintenance_company - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            }
            set_technology = { tech_maintenance_company = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_field_hospital - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
                has_tech = motorised_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_field_hospital = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_logistics_company - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
                has_tech = motorised_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_logistics_company = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # tech_signal_company - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
                has_tech = radio
                has_tech = motorised_infantry
            }
            set_technology = { tech_signal_company = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
