#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# armor_tech_5
#   year=2020 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# engine_tech_5
#   year=2020 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# armor_tech_6
#   year=2030 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# engine_tech_6
#   year=2030 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1914 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1934 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1941 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1945 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1945 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2005 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2005 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2010 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2010 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y2030 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1914 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # armored_car1 - 1914
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { armored_car1 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1934 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_light_td - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_td }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_td = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_light_art - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_art }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_light_spaa - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_heavy_td - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_td }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_td = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_heavy_art - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_art }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_heavy_spaa - 1934
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # improved_light_td - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_td }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { improved_light_td = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_light_art - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_art }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { improved_light_art = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_light_spaa - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { improved_light_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # JAP_lighter_tanks - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = JAP_lighter_tanks }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { JAP_lighter_tanks = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # GER_heavy_armored_car - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = GER_heavy_armored_car }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { GER_heavy_armored_car = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # NOR_rikstanken_tech - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = NOR_rikstanken_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { NOR_rikstanken_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1938 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        # amphibious_tank_chassis - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_tank_chassis }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_y1939 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_medium_td - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_td }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_spaa }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { basic_medium_spaa = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # amphibious_tank - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_tank }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { amphibious_tank = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # armored_car2 - 1940
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = armored_car2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            }
            set_technology = { armored_car2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { armor_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # engine_tech_2 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
                has_dlc = "No Step Back"
            }
            set_technology = { engine_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2005 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2005 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_dlc = "No Step Back"

# -- NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (20 techs) --

# early_battlecruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battleship
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battleship
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_battleship
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# near_future_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# near_future_battleship
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_battleship
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship3
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_battleships = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y2008 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y2016 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_battleships_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_battlecruiser - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_battlecruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { early_battlecruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # ship_hull_super_heavy - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_super_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { ship_hull_super_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_armor_scheme
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y1940 = {
    if = {

            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y2008 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # improved_ship_hull_heavy - 2008
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_battleship - 2008
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { improved_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_y2016 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_ship_hull_heavy - 2016
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_heavy }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_battleship - 2016
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_battleship }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_battleship = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # heavy_battleship2 - 2016

                NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_battleship2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships

            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            }
            set_technology = { heavy_battleship3 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- NAVAL / CARRIERS (20 techs) --

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_fleet_carrier
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_carrier
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# near_future_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# near_future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# near_future_carrier
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# future_carrier
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1944 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y2008 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y2016 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_carriers_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1942 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
        }
        # sp_refined_pykrete - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_refined_pykrete }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_refined_pykrete = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1944 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
        }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Gotterdammerung"
            }

    }

arm_grant_naval_carriers_y1980 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }

                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_carrier }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # ship_hull_fleet_carrier - 1980

                NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_fleet_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        # early_carrier - 1980

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            }
            set_technology = { early_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            }
            set_technology = { basic_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            }
            set_technology = { improved_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_carriers_y2016 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # advanced_ship_hull_carrier - 2016
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_ship_hull_fleet_carrier - 2016
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_fleet_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_fleet_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_carrier - 2016
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { near_future_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            }
            set_technology = { near_future_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }

                NOT = { has_tech = future_ship_hull_carrier }

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { future_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier - 2032

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # future_carrier - 2032

                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            }
            set_technology = { future_carrier = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- NAVAL / DESTROYERS (30 techs) --

# improved_depth_charges
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_depth_charges
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# modern_depth_charges
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# modern_sonar
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_light
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# smoke_generator
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sonar
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_destroyer
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_depth_charges
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# basic_ship_hull_light
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_patrol_boat
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_sonar
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_destroyer
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_patrol_boat
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_light
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_sonar
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_destroyer
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_patrol_boat
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_light
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# upgraded_sonar
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_destroyer
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_patrol_boat
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# near_future_ship_hull_light
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# near_future_sonar
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# near_future_destroyer
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# near_future_patrol_boat
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# future_ship_hull_light
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# future_sonar
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# future_destroyer
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# future_patrol_boat
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_destroyers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1990 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y2008 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y2016 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_depth_charges
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1939 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_depth_charges
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1943 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): modern_depth_charges
        # modern_sonar - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = modern_sonar }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { modern_sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y1980 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_ship_hull_light - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_light }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # smoke_generator - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = smoke_generator }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { smoke_generator = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # sonar - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sonar }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # early_destroyer - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            }
            set_technology = { early_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_destroyer - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_destroyer }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            }
            set_technology = { basic_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_patrol_boat - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_patrol_boat }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            }
            set_technology = { basic_patrol_boat = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_y2008 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # improved_ship_hull_light - 2008
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_light }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # advanced_sonar - 2008
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = advanced_sonar }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { advanced_sonar = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_destroyer - 2008

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_destroyer }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            }
            set_technology = { improved_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # improved_patrol_boat - 2008
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_patrol_boat }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            }
            set_technology = { improved_patrol_boat = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
