# -- NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (6 techs) --

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# near_future_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# future_heavy_cruiser
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y2008 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y2016 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_y1980 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_heavy_cruiser - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { early_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { future_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}
# -- NAVAL / LIGHT_CRUISERS (20 techs) --

# early_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_light_cruiser
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# improved_airplane_launcher
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_light_cruiser
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# improved_light_cruiser
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_airplane_launcher
#   year=2012 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_light_cruiser
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# near_future_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# near_future_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# near_future_airplane_launcher
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# near_future_light_cruiser
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# future_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# future_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# future_light_cruiser
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y2008 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y2016 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y1980 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_ship_hull_cruiser - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # early_light_cruiser - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_light_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { early_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_ship_hull_cruiser - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
        # improved_airplane_launcher - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_airplane_launcher }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_airplane_launcher = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_light_cruiser - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_cruiser }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# mtg_landing_craft
#   year=2004 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# landing_craft

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# near_future_ship_torpedo_launcher

#   year=2032 branch=naval category=naval_support

# future_light_battery
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=naval_support

# future_heavy_battery
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_naval_naval_support = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1922 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1936 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1938 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1940 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1942 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1990 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1990 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2004 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2004 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2008 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2012 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2016 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2020 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1922 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # submarine_mine_laying - 1922
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = submarine_mine_laying }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { submarine_mine_laying = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1936 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # improved_naval_mines - 1936
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = improved_naval_mines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { improved_naval_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # degaussing - 1938
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = degaussing }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { degaussing = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): sp_multi_product_supply_ships
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1942 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # airdrop_mines - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = airdrop_mines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { airdrop_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # airdrop_mines_bba - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = airdrop_mines_bba }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { airdrop_mines_bba = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # airsweep_mines - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = airsweep_mines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { airsweep_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # airsweep_mines_bba - 1942
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = airsweep_mines_bba }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1942 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { airsweep_mines_bba = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): sp_improved_support_ship
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): sp_improved_repair_ship
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_y1980 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_torpedo - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_torpedo }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_torpedo = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_battery - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_battery }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_battery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_naval_mines - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_naval_mines }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_naval_mines = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # mtg_transport - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = mtg_transport }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { mtg_transport = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # transport - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = transport }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            }
            set_technology = { transport = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    if = {

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            }

        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_battery }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_light_battery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_heavy_battery - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_battery }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_heavy_battery = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # underway_replenishment_tech_2 - 2000
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = underway_replenishment_tech_2 }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { underway_replenishment_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

# -- NAVAL / SUBMARINES (22 techs) --

# basic_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_submarine
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine
#   year=2000 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine
#   year=2008 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_submarine
#   year=2016 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# near_future_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# near_future_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# near_future_submarine
#   year=2024 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# future_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# future_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# future_submarine
#   year=2032 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_submarines = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # Year-sliced dispatch avoids scanning future tech eras every pulse.
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1939 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1943 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1980 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y2000 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y2008 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y2016 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y2024 = yes
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            }
            arm_grant_naval_submarines_y2032 = yes
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1939 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # basic_submarine_snorkel - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_submarine_snorkel }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_submarine_snorkel = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # sp_aip_engine_improved_tech - 1939
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_aip_engine_improved_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1943 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_submarine_snorkel
        # sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech - 1943
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_submarines_y1980 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # early_ship_hull_submarine - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # early_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { early_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # early_submarine - 1980
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = early_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            }
            set_technology = { early_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_submarines_y2000 = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
        }
        # basic_ship_hull_submarine - 2000

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine - 2000

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
                has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
            }
            set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_ballistic_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
        # basic_submarine - 2000

            limit = {
                NOT = { has_tech = basic_submarine }
                check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
                check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
                has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            }
            set_technology = { basic_submarine = 1 popup = no }
            add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
        }
    }
}

    }

                check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
